title: helianthemum lasianthum subsp. formosum
intro: Helianthemum lasianthum subsp. formosum, also known as Formosa rockrose, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Cistaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues, due to its high content of flavonoids and terpenoids. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
